evidence_quotes.quote: make it illegal for a company to make a digital product worthless after purchase, by closing down access to the material and/or experience I have already paid for.
A developer shall be able to offer tools to continue using the product if the company decides to stop performing maintenance for the digital product purchased by consumers.

paragraphs.text: As a Swedish citizen, I underline the importance of having a consumer-focused market in digital property. I want to see the EU come up with laws that make it illegal for a company to make a digital product worthless after purchase, by closing down access to the material and/or experience I have already paid for. A developer shall be able to offer tools to continue using the product if the company decides to stop performing maintenance for the digital product purchased by consumers.
